title: Welcome Pierre Moisan to Tryll Engine
excerpt: Pierre Moisan, a pioneer of the Canadian video game industry with 30 years of experience, joins Tryll Engine as strategic advisor.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Assistant v0.0.8 — CUDA & HIP Support
excerpt: v0.0.8 adds NVIDIA CUDA and AMD HIP backends alongside the existing Vulkan support. Both are available as optional DLCs on Steam.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Alexander Stojanovic as Advisor
excerpt: Alexander Stojanovic, VP of NEXT AI R&D at Microsoft GenAI, joins Tryll Engine as Advisor.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Assistant Is Live on Steam
excerpt: Our on-device gaming assistant is now available on Steam. Press a hotkey in-game, ask your question, get a clear answer, and continue playing.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: How We Catch Prompt Injections and Hallucinations
excerpt: A deep dive into the three-layer security pipeline behind Tryll Assistant — from regex-based injection filters to RAG and semantic similarity checks.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: We've Received an Epic MegaGrant from Unreal Engine
excerpt: Tryll Engine has been awarded an Epic MegaGrant to bring on-device AI into Unreal Engine games.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Vladimir Belyaev as CTO
excerpt: Vladimir Belyaev joins Tryll Engine as CTO, bringing 30 years of gaming industry experience including 11 years in senior leadership roles at Playrix.
author: Tryll Engine Team
